synopsis: Princess Leia takes center stage this issue as we look at what makes her tick! We'll also be taking an indepth look at the all-new comic book The Star Wars, which turns the once familiar saga on its head! Much-loved artist Jeffrey Brown offers a unique look at his forthcoming new comic book, Jedi Academy, and Star Wars: The Clone Wars pirate Hondo Ohnaka stars in a unique adventure exclusively in Insider!
title: Insider #144
